## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullet points describing what changed and why -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code restructuring
- [ ] test — test improvements
- [ ] chore — CI, deps, config
- [ ] docs — documentation only

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual smoke test (if UI/runtime change)
